CONSIDERING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, THE COURT MADE AN ORDER GRANTING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, EXCEPT $37.50 PER PAY PERIOD AND
ORDERING THE RELEASE OF ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. BASED UPON THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT'S NOTIFICATION TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR THAT
CASE CONTINUED TO 5/15/03 AT 11:00AM. APPEARANCES NOT REQUIRED. PARTIES TO REACH SETTLEMENT AND ADVISE COURT TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT & DISMISS
COPY OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES AND THE VENTURA COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPT.

CERTIFIED MAILING TO MICHAEL FULLER RETURNED SIGNED.
THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ON THIS CASE WAS HEARD ON MARCH 12, 2003 IN DEPT. 612 BEFORE COMMISSIONER HEWLETT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR, MICHAEL FULLER APPEARED.
MUST BE HEARD IN THAT COURT. THE CIVIL DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT WAS NOT ADVISED PRIOR TO THE HEARING THAT JUDGMENT CREDITOR HAD BEEN ADVISED TO
